auth.tagline: Capture your brilliant ideas before you forget them.

error.title: Sign-in problem
error.OAuthAccountNotLinked: An account already exists with this email address via a different provider. Please sign in using the same provider you used when you first signed up.
error.AccessDenied: Access denied. You did not authorize access to your account.
error.OAuthSignin: Could not start the sign-in flow. Please try again.
error.OAuthCallback: An error occurred during the provider callback. Please try again.
error.OAuthCreateAccount: Could not create your account. Please try again.
error.Callback: An error occurred during sign-in. Please try again.
error.Configuration: The service is temporarily unavailable. Please try again later.
error.Default: An unexpected error occurred. Please try again.

ideas.title: My ideas
ideas.emptyDesc: Start by capturing your first brilliant idea.

tags.title: My tags
tags.empty: No tags yet. Add tags to your ideas.

home.hero: Never lose a great idea again
home.heroSub: Capture, organize, and retrieve all your innovative ideas in one place.
